title: New Safe Haven Baby Box blessed in Hermitage
description: HERMITAGE — Parents caught in overwhelming circumstances can surrender their babies safely, anonymously and legally through the Hermitage Volunteer Fire Department’s newly-installed Safe Haven Baby Box.

title: IPL 2026: Yashasvi Jaiswal's unbeaten 77 helps Rajasthan Royals beat Mumbai Indians by 27 runs
description: Yashasvi Jaiswal, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi star as Rajasthan Royals thrash Mumbai Indians by 27 runs in a rain-shortened 11-overs-a-side Match 13 in the Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026 at the ACA Stadium in Guwahati on Tuesday.

title: Mullin pledges progress on disaster relief during his first official trip as DHS secretary
description: CHIMNEY ROCK — Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin on Tuesday toured North Carolina areas devastated by Hurricane Helene in 2024, revealing plans to prioritize relief to disaster-impacted communities on his first official trip since replacing Kristi Noem, whose leadership cast...

title: Woman charged with criminal sexual conduct with a vulnerable adult
description: MANKATO — A Mankato woman is facing a felony charge alleging she engaged in a sexual relationship with a vulnerable adult while working as a caregiver at a group home.

title: Flat Creek Solar permit in Canajoharie, Root approved
description: MONTGOMERY COUNTY — A final siting permit has been issued by the state for the 300-megawatt Flat Creek Solar project in the towns of Root and Canajoharie despite widespread local opposition.
